rationale: Intermittent Evergreen CI RSpec mock expectation failures; test infrastructure flakiness, no spec behavior involved.
SDAM spec 'Requesting an Immediate Check' requires concurrent monitor-driven rescans; driver was blocking main thread instead.
JRuby concurrency/formatter-specific test failures; no spec behavior contradicted.
Adding test coverage for topology connections; test improvement with no spec violation.
SDAM spec roundtriptime section says RTT must not update on failed ismaster; driver was updating it incorrectly.
Transactions spec defines error-labels; driver failed to parse TransientTransactionError labels from server response into Error objects.
Internal cleanup removing unnecessary :none default flag from op_msg; no spec rule about this default.
CI logging infrastructure improvement for diagnosing SDAM failures; no spec behavior involved.
Refactoring spec test runner to support nested session substitutions for transaction API tests; test runner improvement.
Replacing Ruby constant with let expressions in test files to eliminate Ruby warnings; test code cleanup.
Adding CI configuration variant with retryWrites=true; CI setup with no spec violation.
Internal test refactor to unify event subscriber helpers; no driver behavior change.
Internal refactor to set request ID in constructor instead of lazily; no spec rule about when request ID is set.
CI build failure due to bundler 2/RubyGems version incompatibility; packaging/build issue.
DRY refactor of causal consistency/read concern code; internal code deduplication, no behavior change.
Internal cleanup to prohibit unused multi-message dispatch; no spec rule defines single-message dispatch requirement.
Enabling linting in CI configuration; no spec behavior involved.
Internal refactor to create write concern base class for type-checking; no spec rule violated.
Improving CRUD/transaction spec test runner assertions to emit diagnostic diffs; test infrastructure improvement.
Reordering command monitoring events relative to auth setup; implementation aesthetic, no specific spec ordering rule cited.
Documentation and test coverage improvement for retryable writes; no spec violation.
Adding linter to validate that user-facing read concern options exclude afterClusterTime; internal API validation, not a spec deviation.
Spec test runner ignored null-valued expectations contrary to transactions spec README; test runner bug, not driver behavior.
Internal refactor abstracting monotonic ID generation as prep for CMAP; no driver behavior violation.
NoMethodError in aggregate explain when server returns splitPipeline key; no spec rule about explain response parsing.
Release task for mongo_kerberos gem; packaging/release with no spec behavior involved.
Adding @api private annotations to internal session transaction methods; docs/API annotation only.
Sessions spec says 'drivers MUST report an error' on ended session; driver returned nil instead of raising.
BSON::Int64 equality operator missing; Ruby object equality bug, not a MongoDB BSON spec requirement.
Backporting BSON 5.0 API-compatible changes to 4.x branch; release/backport task.
Moving Ruby symbol BSON serialization from Ruby to C/Java for performance; implementation optimization with no spec violation.
Moving integer BSON serialization to C/Java for performance; implementation optimization with no spec rule violated.
POC for convenient transactions API; thin description, no spec nonconformance indicated.
Improving session API documentation about txn_num incrementation; docs improvement only.
BSON::Document#fetch signature incompatible with Ruby Hash#fetch; Ruby API compat regression, not a BSON spec rule.
Connection string spec defines tlsAllowInvalidHostnames/tlsInsecure options; driver behavior was inconsistent with OpenSSL version.
ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone timezone offset dropped in BSON serialization; Ruby interop bug, no MongoDB spec rule violated.
Nonstandard SPDX license identifier in gemspec causing gem release warning; packaging issue.
Backporting SDAM logging improvements to 2.6 branch; logging/backport with no spec behavior change.
Adding Ruby 2.6 to CI test matrix; CI configuration with no spec involvement.
URI options spec tests fail: tlsAllowInvalidCertificates/Hostnames not mapping correctly to client options.
retryWrites URI option missing from tutorial documentation; docs bug only.
Resyncing transactions spec tests per DRIVERS-590 to add session1 in APM expectations; test infrastructure update.
Integration test failures in change stream getMore; likely server compatibility issue, no specific spec rule contradiction identified.
Cluster hangs when Time.now stubbed due to SDAM monitor relying on real time; implementation bug, no spec rule about time stubbing.
Command monitoring spec requires full command document in events; write concern sometimes omitted because event published before command constructed.
Adding 3.6 server with 3.4 FCV to CI; test infrastructure/configuration with no spec violation.
NilError calling session.in_transaction? when sessions unsupported; implementation bug, no spec rule about handling nil sessions during response.
Expanding test coverage to verify spec rule that retryable writes must not occur in transaction context; test infrastructure gap.
